StringData.String: Uh oh... looks like you're out of sync; attempting to re-sync. If this takes too long, refresh your browser...
It looks like we've lost our connection to the server. Please refresh your browser.
You must refresh your browser to continue playing.
There was an error authenticating your user. You could be logged in on multiple machines. Please refresh your browser.
Your machine is unable to contact EA servers. Please make sure you are connected to the internet and you are not behind a firewall.
You have been forcibly kicked by EA servers. Your profile is either logged into another computer or is undergoing maintenance.
Your client is out of date, please refresh to get the latest client.
Unable to log into EA servers. Please refresh to try again.
